description: Product Description ELEVATE YOUR COMFORT: Introducing our Ladies Plain Socks – the epitome of comfort and style. Immerse your feet in the luxurious embrace of these socks designed for the modern woman who appreciates both simplicity and sophistication PURE BLISS FOR YOUR FEET: Experience a new level of comfort with our Ladies Soft & Breathable Socks. Crafted with meticulous care, these socks boast a heavenly blend of 55% Cotton, 38% Polyester, and 7% Nylon. Let your feet breathe and revel in the softness that accompanies every step. Revitalize your sock collection with our Pack of 6 Plain Socks – a true testament to versatility. These socks, available in timeless Black, Grey, Charcoal, Navy, and White, effortlessly complement any outfit. Whether it is a casual day out or a formal affair, you're covered with the perfect sock for every occasion. TAILORED TO PERFECTION: Bid farewell to uncomfortable, one-size-fits-all socks. Our Ladies Plain Socks cater specifically to UK Shoe Sizes 4-7, providing a tailored fit that embraces your feet in comfort. Revel in the joy of socks that stay in place, supporting you with every stride. GREAT GIFT IDEA: Looking for the perfect gift? This could be the ideal choice for your loved ones!
